title: Syntax-highlighted code block component with copy functionality
purpose: Displays code with syntax highlighting, line numbers, and copy-to-clipboard capabilities in either light or dark theme.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named CodeBlock that accepts various props for customization including language, theme, and copy button visibility.

steps.content: Initialize state to track whether the code has been copied.
Create a reference to the code container element for DOM access.
Define a handler function to copy the code to the clipboard when invoked.
Determine if dark mode is active based on the theme prop.
Select the appropriate syntax highlighting theme based on the dark mode setting.
Render the code block with language header, copy button, and syntax-highlighted code.
Include accessibility elements for screen readers.
Attempt to write the code content to the clipboard.
IF the copy operation succeeds, update the copied state to true.
Set a timeout to reset the copied state after two seconds.
IF the copy operation fails, log an error to the console.
